purpose: Candidate aggregate tactical profiles for future testing after improving API-Football fixture-detail coverage.

status.reason: Current tactical detail coverage is about 45%, still below the 60% minimum target for activating profile features.

profiles.name: tactical_attacking_pressure_diff
profiles.label: perfil_ofensivo
profiles.description: Recent attacking pressure from shots on goal, box shots, total shots, and corners.

profiles.name: tactical_buildup_control_diff
profiles.label: perfil_construccion
profiles.description: Recent buildup/control profile from possession and pass volume/accuracy.

profiles.name: tactical_direct_play_diff
profiles.label: perfil_directo_contraataque
profiles.description: Recent direct/vertical play profile, rewarding shots and offsides while discounting possession/pass volume.

profiles.name: tactical_defensive_stress_diff
profiles.label: perfil_estres_defensivo_disciplina
profiles.description: Recent defensive stress and discipline profile from goalkeeper saves, fouls, and yellow cards.
